text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I arrive in the waiting room, I see Mejiro
Ryan furiously doing squats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know it! My results from the last race are still
bothering me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The bigger the load I take on like this, the
tougher my muscles will get!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: And I bet the same goes for my mind too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause I lost that I can overcome my
frustration and continue to improve!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I'm stronger than I was before—today I'll win!
